EMA tracker: numerically-stable, NaN-poisoning-proof. Default decay alpha_phi^-3 = 1/(2*PHI+1) ≈ 0.236, anchored via debug_assert against PHI from invariants (L-R14 trace). EmaError closed enum: AlphaOutOfRange, NonFiniteObservation, NoUpdatesYet. 7 falsifications: alpha=0, alpha<0, alpha>1, alpha=NaN, NaN obs, ±∞ obs, bias_corrected before any update. 2 anchor guards: phi-derivation drift, bounds canonical.
